requirement_topic.en: JSMO Conformity Certificate — Mandatory Technical Regulation for Regulated Products (Certificate of Conformity at Aqaba import)
requirement_topic.zh: JSMO符合性证书——受管制产品强制技术法规（亚喀巴进口符合性证书）
requirement_topic.zht: JSMO符合性證書——受管制產品強制技術法規（亞喀巴進口符合性證書）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances are regulated electrical products in Jordan and require a JSMO conformity certificate (Certificate of Conformity) issued against the applicable Jordanian technical regulation before they can be cleared through customs (principally the port of Aqaba) and placed on the market. The certificate confirms that the appliance meets the adopted Jordanian Standards for electrical safety (JS / IEC 60335-2-24), EMC (JS / CISPR 14 basis), and energy-efficiency/MEPS requirements. The conformity assessment is supported by a technical dossier — test reports (ideally on an IEC / IECEE CB basis), the rating-plate and marking details (230 V / 50 Hz), refrigerant declaration, and the energy-class data. There is no single CE-style mark in Jordan and no EU-style manufacturer self-declaration route for regulated products; conformity is evidenced through the JSMO certificate obtained, in practice, with the involvement of the in-country importer. Customs at Aqaba check for the conformity certificate as a condition of release.
summary.zh: 家用制冷器具在约旦属受管制电器产品，须在通关（主要为亚喀巴港）并投放市场前取得依据适用约旦技术法规签发的JSMO符合性证书（Certificate of Conformity）。该证书确认器具满足所采纳的约旦标准的电气安全（JS / IEC 60335-2-24）、电磁兼容（JS / CISPR 14基础）及能效/MEPS要求。合格评定以技术档案为支撑——检测报告（最好基于IEC / IECEE CB）、铭牌与标识信息（230 V / 50 Hz）、制冷剂声明及能效等级数据。约旦无单一类CE标识，受管制产品亦无类似欧盟的制造商自我声明路径；符合性通过取得JSMO证书证明，实践中由当地进口商参与办理。亚喀巴海关将符合性证书作为放行条件予以核查。
summary.zht: 家用製冷器具在約旦屬受管制電器產品，須在通關（主要為亞喀巴港）並投放市場前取得依據適用約旦技術法規簽發的JSMO符合性證書（Certificate of Conformity）。該證書確認器具滿足所採納的約旦標準的電氣安全（JS / IEC 60335-2-24）、電磁相容（JS / CISPR 14基礎）及能效/MEPS要求。合格評定以技術檔案為支撐——檢測報告（最好基於IEC / IECEE CB）、銘牌與標識資訊（230 V / 50 Hz）、製冷劑聲明及能效等級數據。約旦無單一類CE標識，受管制產品亦無類似歐盟的製造商自我聲明路徑；符合性通過取得JSMO證書證明，實踐中由當地進口商參與辦理。亞喀巴海關將符合性證書作為放行條件予以核查。

standards_or_laws: JSMO mandatory technical regulation for regulated electrical products — Certificate of Conformity required before customs clearance and market placement
JS / IEC 60335-2-24 (safety), JS / CISPR 14 (EMC), JSMO energy-efficiency/MEPS regulation — collectively evidenced in the conformity dossier
Port of entry: Aqaba — customs release conditional on the JSMO conformity certificate
IECEE CB Scheme test reports — accepted basis to reduce duplicate testing (confirm with JSMO/importer)

summary.en: In China, household refrigerating appliances require China Compulsory Certification (CCC) covering safety (GB 4706.13) and EMC (GB 4343.1) before sale, administered by CNCA-designated certification bodies under SAMR; the China Energy Label (GB 12021.2 basis) is a separate mandatory requirement under NDRC/SAMR. CCC is a domestic third-party certification and is not directly accepted by JSMO as the basis for a Jordanian conformity certificate. However, because the underlying GB standards derive from the same IEC/CISPR texts, the test data developed for CCC — especially if backed by IECEE CB Scheme reports — can substantially reduce the testing needed for the JSMO conformity certificate.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用制冷器具销售前须取得涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和电磁兼容（GB 4343.1）的中国强制认证（CCC），由SAMR下CNCA指定认证机构办理；中国能效标识（GB 12021.2基础）为NDRC/SAMR下的独立强制要求。CCC为国内第三方认证，不被JSMO直接接受为约旦符合性证书的依据。但由于底层GB标准源自相同的IEC/CISPR文本，为CCC形成的检测数据——尤其若有IECEE CB体系报告支撑——可大幅缩减JSMO符合性证书所需的检测。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用製冷器具銷售前須取得涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和電磁相容（GB 4343.1）的中國強制認證（CCC），由SAMR下CNCA指定認證機構辦理；中國能效標識（GB 12021.2基礎）為NDRC/SAMR下的獨立強制要求。CCC為國內第三方認證，不被JSMO直接接受為約旦符合性證書的依據。但由於底層GB標準源自相同的IEC/CISPR文本，為CCC形成的檢測數據——尤其若有IECEE CB體系報告支撐——可大幅縮減JSMO符合性證書所需的檢測。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety (GB 4706.13) + EMC (GB 4343.1); mandatory; administered by CNCA/SAMR
China Energy Label — Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR); based on GB 12021.2-2015

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers must obtain a JSMO conformity certificate even though they already hold CCC: (1) Conformity certificate, not CCC — the Jordanian Certificate of Conformity is issued against the Jordanian technical regulation; the Chinese CCC certificate is not accepted as a substitute, although the supporting IEC-based test data (and especially IECEE CB reports) can be re-used to minimise re-testing. (2) Combined scope — the JSMO conformity dossier must cover safety, EMC, refrigerant declaration, and the energy-efficiency class/MEPS together, plus the 230 V / 50 Hz rating; the Chinese package (CCC + separate China Energy Label) must be re-compiled to the Jordanian structure. (3) Arabic markings — product markings and instructions should be available in Arabic. (4) Customs at Aqaba — release is conditional on presenting the conformity certificate, which is practically coordinated by the in-country importer (see frigjo-market-002). Jordan does not operate an EU-style RoHS, battery, or outdoor-noise horizontal regime, so those EU-only obligations do not apply.
gap.zh: 中国制造商即便已持CCC，仍须取得JSMO符合性证书：（1）符合性证书而非CCC——约旦符合性证书依据约旦技术法规签发；中国CCC证书不被接受为替代，尽管其IEC基础检测数据（尤其IECEE CB报告）可复用以最小化重新检测。（2）合并范围——JSMO符合性档案须一并涵盖安全、电磁兼容、制冷剂声明及能效等级/MEPS，外加230 V / 50 Hz额定；中国资料包（CCC加独立的中国能效标识）须按约旦结构重新整合。（3）阿拉伯语标识——产品标识与说明书宜提供阿拉伯语版本。（4）亚喀巴海关——放行以出示符合性证书为条件，实践中由当地进口商协调办理（见frigjo-market-002）。约旦不实行类似欧盟的RoHS、电池或户外噪声横向制度，故该等欧盟特有义务不适用。
gap.zht: 中國製造商即便已持CCC，仍須取得JSMO符合性證書：（1）符合性證書而非CCC——約旦符合性證書依據約旦技術法規簽發；中國CCC證書不被接受為替代，儘管其IEC基礎檢測數據（尤其IECEE CB報告）可複用以最小化重新檢測。（2）合併範圍——JSMO符合性檔案須一併涵蓋安全、電磁相容、製冷劑聲明及能效等級/MEPS，外加230 V / 50 Hz額定；中國資料包（CCC加獨立的中國能效標識）須按約旦結構重新整合。（3）阿拉伯語標識——產品標識與說明書宜提供阿拉伯語版本。（4）亞喀巴海關——放行以出示符合性證書為條件，實踐中由當地進口商協調辦理（見frigjo-market-002）。約旦不實行類似歐盟的RoHS、電池或戶外噪聲橫向制度，故該等歐盟特有義務不適用。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — JSMO Certificate of Conformity required before customs clearance (Aqaba) and market placement; covers safety, EMC, refrigerant, and energy/MEPS collectively
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification (safety + EMC) + China Energy Label display required before sale in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A JSMO Certificate of Conformity against the Jordanian technical regulation is the hard gate for clearing refrigerators through Aqaba and placing them on the Jordanian market. Chinese CCC is not accepted as a substitute, but IEC-based test data and IECEE CB reports can sharply reduce re-testing. The dossier must combine safety, EMC, refrigerant, and energy/MEPS, with 230 V / 50 Hz rating and Arabic markings. No EU-style RoHS/battery/noise horizontal regime applies.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据约旦技术法规签发的JSMO符合性证书是电冰箱经亚喀巴通关并投放约旦市场的强制门槛。中国CCC不被接受为替代，但IEC基础检测数据及IECEE CB报告可大幅缩减重新检测。档案须合并安全、电磁兼容、制冷剂及能效/MEPS，并具备230 V / 50 Hz额定及阿拉伯语标识。无类似欧盟的RoHS/电池/噪声横向制度适用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據約旦技術法規簽發的JSMO符合性證書是電冰箱經亞喀巴通關並投放約旦市場的強制門檻。中國CCC不被接受為替代，但IEC基礎檢測數據及IECEE CB報告可大幅縮減重新檢測。檔案須合併安全、電磁相容、製冷劑及能效/MEPS，並具備230 V / 50 Hz額定及阿拉伯語標識。無類似歐盟的RoHS/電池/噪聲橫向制度適用。

requirement_topic.en: In-Country Importer of Record — Jordan-Established Importer for Customs and Market Placement
requirement_topic.zh: 当地进口记录方——在约旦设立的进口商负责通关与市场投放
requirement_topic.zht: 當地進口記錄方——在約旦設立的進口商負責通關與市場投放

summary.en: To place household refrigerating appliances on the Jordanian market, there must be an in-country importer of record — a company legally established and registered in Jordan that imports the goods, clears them through customs at Aqaba, and is the responsible party for the JSMO conformity certificate process and market placement. The Jordanian importer typically holds the import documentation, coordinates the conformity assessment and certificate issuance with JSMO, arranges the Arabic-language labelling/markings and the Jordanian energy label, and is the point of contact for the authorities for any compliance follow-up or corrective action. A foreign manufacturer cannot directly place products on the Jordanian market without this established importer; logistics agents or customs brokers acting in a transactional capacity do not by themselves satisfy the importer-of-record role for conformity purposes.
summary.zh: 在约旦市场投放家用制冷器具，须有当地进口记录方——一家在约旦合法设立并注册的公司，负责进口货物、在亚喀巴办理通关，并作为JSMO符合性证书流程及市场投放的责任方。约旦进口商通常持有进口文件，与JSMO协调合格评定与证书签发，安排阿拉伯语标识/标记及约旦能效标签，并作为当局就任何合规跟进或纠正措施的联络点。境外制造商在没有该设立进口商的情况下不能直接向约旦市场投放产品；以交易身份行事的物流代理或报关行本身不满足符合性意义上的进口记录方角色。
summary.zht: 在約旦市場投放家用製冷器具，須有當地進口記錄方——一家在約旦合法設立並註冊的公司，負責進口貨物、在亞喀巴辦理通關，並作為JSMO符合性證書流程及市場投放的責任方。約旦進口商通常持有進口文件，與JSMO協調合格評定與證書簽發，安排阿拉伯語標識/標記及約旦能效標籤，並作為當局就任何合規跟進或糾正措施的聯絡點。境外製造商在沒有該設立進口商的情況下不能直接向約旦市場投放產品；以交易身份行事的物流代理或報關行本身不滿足符合性意義上的進口記錄方角色。

standards_or_laws: Jordanian import and customs requirements — importer of record must be a Jordan-established/registered company
JSMO conformity certificate process — practically coordinated by the in-country importer
Port of entry: Aqaba — importer arranges customs clearance and presents the conformity certificate

summary.en: China has no direct regulatory equivalent obligating an export manufacturer to appoint a destination-country resident importer of record responsible for conformity and market-surveillance follow-up. Chinese exporters typically work with overseas distributors or trading companies on a commercial basis. Under the domestic CCC regime, the certificate holder is the responsible party for the Chinese market only; this role does not extend to or satisfy the Jordanian in-country importer requirement. The Jordanian importer-of-record obligation is therefore a structural requirement with no statutory Chinese analogue for export-bound goods.
summary.zh: 中国没有直接的监管等同规定，要求出口制造商指定一名在目的国设立、负责符合性及市场监督跟进的进口记录方。中国出口商通常以商业方式与海外经销商或贸易公司合作。在国内CCC制度下，证书持有人仅为中国市场的责任方；该角色不延伸至亦不满足约旦当地进口商要求。因此，约旦进口记录方义务是一项结构性要求，对出口货物而言在中国无法定对应。
summary.zht: 中國沒有直接的監管等同規定，要求出口製造商指定一名在目的國設立、負責符合性及市場監督跟進的進口記錄方。中國出口商通常以商業方式與海外經銷商或貿易公司合作。在國內CCC制度下，證書持有人僅為中國市場的責任方；該角色不延伸至亦不滿足約旦當地進口商要求。因此，約旦進口記錄方義務是一項結構性要求，對出口貨物而言在中國無法定對應。

standards_or_laws: N/A — no direct Chinese regulatory equivalent requiring a destination-country importer of record for export goods

gap.en: This is a structural gap with no Chinese regulatory analogue. A Chinese refrigerator manufacturer must secure a Jordan-established importer of record before goods can be cleared and placed on the market: (1) the importer must be a legally registered Jordanian entity, not merely a freight forwarder or customs broker acting transactionally; (2) the importer holds the import documentation and is the responsible party coordinating the JSMO conformity certificate, the Arabic labelling, and the Jordanian energy label; (3) the importer is the authorities' point of contact for any post-market compliance follow-up. Without this in-country importer, customs at Aqaba will not release the goods and the product cannot legally be placed on the Jordanian market, regardless of the technical compliance of the appliance. Note this differs from the EU Authorised Representative concept: Jordan's requirement is satisfied by an established importer of record rather than an EU-style mandated AR appointment.
gap.zh: 这是一项在中国监管体系中无类似规定的结构性差距。中国电冰箱制造商须在货物通关并投放市场前确保有一家在约旦设立的进口记录方：（1）进口商须为合法注册的约旦实体，而非仅以交易身份行事的货运代理或报关行；（2）进口商持有进口文件，并作为协调JSMO符合性证书、阿拉伯语标识及约旦能效标签的责任方；（3）进口商为当局就任何上市后合规跟进的联络点。在没有该当地进口商的情况下，亚喀巴海关将不予放行，且无论器具技术合规与否，产品均不能在约旦市场合法投放。注意此与欧盟授权代表概念不同：约旦要求由设立的进口记录方满足，而非类似欧盟的强制授权代表委任。
gap.zht: 這是一項在中國監管體系中無類似規定的結構性差距。中國電冰箱製造商須在貨物通關並投放市場前確保有一家在約旦設立的進口記錄方：（1）進口商須為合法註冊的約旦實體，而非僅以交易身份行事的貨運代理或報關行；（2）進口商持有進口文件，並作為協調JSMO符合性證書、阿拉伯語標識及約旦能效標籤的責任方；（3）進口商為當局就任何上市後合規跟進的聯絡點。在沒有該當地進口商的情況下，亞喀巴海關將不予放行，且無論器具技術合規與否，產品均不能在約旦市場合法投放。注意此與歐盟授權代表概念不同：約旦要求由設立的進口記錄方滿足，而非類似歐盟的強制授權代表委任。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — a Jordan-established importer of record is required for customs clearance (Aqaba) and market placement; logistics/customs agents alone do not satisfy the role
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent requirement — Chinese export manufacturers have no statutory obligation to appoint a destination-country importer of record under Chinese law

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese refrigerator manufacturers must secure a Jordan-established importer of record before goods can clear Aqaba customs and be placed on the market. The importer coordinates the JSMO conformity certificate, Arabic labelling, and energy label, and is the authorities' compliance contact. This differs from the EU AR concept — Jordan relies on an established importer of record. Without it, the goods cannot legally enter the Jordanian market regardless of technical compliance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国电冰箱制造商须在货物通过亚喀巴海关并投放市场前确保有一家在约旦设立的进口记录方。进口商协调JSMO符合性证书、阿拉伯语标识及能效标签，并作为当局的合规联络人。此与欧盟授权代表概念不同——约旦依赖设立的进口记录方。否则，无论技术合规与否，货物均不能合法进入约旦市场。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國電冰箱製造商須在貨物通過亞喀巴海關並投放市場前確保有一家在約旦設立的進口記錄方。進口商協調JSMO符合性證書、阿拉伯語標識及能效標籤，並作為當局的合規聯絡人。此與歐盟授權代表概念不同——約旦依賴設立的進口記錄方。否則，無論技術合規與否，貨物均不能合法進入約旦市場。
